conversations.content: Let's do a special rule knowledge quiz to test your understanding of special rules.

Answer using the special rule explained earlier. It is confirmed that the Defias Brotherhood is gathering in the mine tunnels. According to the Stormwind SI:7 Counter-Subversion Action Act, what should be done?
<function>memory_query_call</function><content>How to handle Defias Brotherhood gathering in mine tunnels</content>

Relevant memory fragment: [mem-id:60007] Time: 2026-06-08-16:05, Content: Stormwind SI:7 Counter-Subversion Action Act: If an encrypted letter of the Black Dragonflight is intercepted, have a spellbreaker forcibly decipher it; if it is confirmed that the Defias Brotherhood is gathering in the mine tunnels, deploy steam tanks to seal the exits; if undead plague zombies of the Scourge are found breaching the city walls, call in gryphon riders to drop incendiary bombs; if it is verified that a vampire is hiding within the House of Nobles, carry out a Sunset Trial and execute them on the spot. Low-relevance memory fragments: none.

conversations.think: Memory [mem-id:60007] stipulates that if the Defias Brotherhood is confirmed to be gathering in the mine tunnels, deploy steam tanks to seal the exits.
conversations.content: According to the Counter-Subversion Action Act, you must deploy steam tanks to seal the exits!
Correct! You have mastered this rule.
